title: Google Gemma 4: Powering AI Builders for Tomorrow! #shorts
summary: Google DeepMind announced Gemma 4, an open AI model licensed under Apache 2.0 designed for AI builders. The model is lightweight enough to run on laptops and targets developers building AI applications.
